title: Set Description via API
excerpt:

Unfortunately, according to support there is no way to set an items description via the API. …

posts.author: bobbybugsplat (Bobby)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve built an integration for https://bugsplat.com so that we can create items in Monday.com from crash reports on BugSplat.

Unfortunately, according to support there is no way to set an items description via the API. This has forced us to push information critical to item resolution as an “Update” which is buried beneath a few clicks. We’d like to put this information front and center in the item.

Please allow us to set the description field when we create items via the API.

Thanks
